**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Great Wall Industry (Xiamen) Co., Ltd. presents an extraordinary case of a legacy 1989 auto-industry SOE ('Xiamen Wan Shan Automobile Industrial Corp.') that has completely metamorphosed into an industrial park operator and a 'catch-all' multi-sector shell. Despite the official 'Auto Parts Manufacturing' classification, the data reveals a stark reality: it has only 11 insured employees (recovered from a column shift). Its massively bloated and modernized business scope—ranging from AI systems, IoT, drone sales, and software development, to non-residential real estate leasing, parking lot services, and park management—proves it no longer manufactures physical auto parts. Instead, it leverages its historical land/factory assets in Huli District, Xiamen, to operate an industrial/tech park, while simultaneously acting as a broad-spectrum bidding, trading, and asset management vehicle.

Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 79)
